name: player_set_world_pose_and_restart_anchor
description: Player::SetWorldPoseAndRestartAnchor copies the restored world position into current and restart-anchor state, stores restart yaw, clears the active variant tag, and mirrors that tag into player state.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SetWorldPoseAndRestartAnchor@Player@@YIXPAUzUtil_SaveGameState@@PBUzVec3@@M@Z at 0x42be00 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 100 bytes and the VC object symbol is 112 bytes with 12 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.

The native smoke verifies the null-save-state no-op path and the normal worldPos, previousTransform translation, restart yaw, global variant-tag clear, active variant-tag mirror, and player-state variant-tag mirror.
